steps.title: Key insight: f must be constant
steps.content: Since $f(0)=19$ and $f(1)=19$, the two known points are $(0,19)$ and $(1,19)$. The slope is $$m=\frac{19-19}{1-0}=0,$$ so the function is constant: $f(x)=19$.

steps.title: Backsolving by testing the candidate (19)
steps.content:
Testing this candidate: $$f(x) = 19$$
Then $$f(0) = 19$$ and $$f(1) = 19$$, which exactly match both given conditions. ✓

That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
